name: Narh'u'ha
rules_text: M:5 A:0 HP:7 L:2 Neutral. Cast on globe. Created in a random square. Narh'u'ha is a Djinn archer with Djinni Bow, Kumatru Archer, and Mirrored Armor. Cannot join groups or add recruits. Any individual spell targeted on Narh'u'ha is squandered, and a random spell of same total cost is added to the top of caster's deck, altered to caster's house and mana types. Only one in play at a time.
